title: TMS Pricing: SSO Add-on
text:
Qase provides **Single Sign-On as an add-on** with our Business tier subscriptions at an additional cost.

SSO comes as a standard feature with our Enterprise subscription, but for smaller teams of users less than 20 who still require SSO functionality, our Business plan with this add-on is an excellent fit.

The pricing follows a *per user per month* model, with each subscription tier having specific minimum user requirements. The Business tier subscription requires a minimum of 5 users to activate. Refer to this article to understand the pricing in more detail: <https://help.qase.io/en/articles/9855720-tms-pricing-explained>

The Business plan with SSO add-on is only available for **annual** subscriptions.

# SSO Add-on Pricing

When you add Single Sign-On functionality to your Business plan, every regular user incurs an additional charge:

## Business Plan Pricing for Regular users

The Business tier subscription costs vary depending on your billing cycle:

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| **Billing Cycle** | **Cost per User per Month** |
| Annual | $30 per user per month |

Additional charge for SSO add-on: **$4 per user per month**

This applies to all **[Regular](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563739-workspace-management-users)** [users](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563739-workspace-management-users) in your workspace, regardless of their role or access level.

Based on the minimum requirement of 5 users, this will be the complete breakdown:

### Annual Subscription

Business plan: $30 per user per month

SSO add-on: $4 per user per month

Total per user: $34 per month

For 5 users: $170 per month

**Annual payment**: $2,040 per year

---

## Read-Only Users

In addition to regular users, teams can choose to include read-only users at a reduced cost:

### Annual Billing

Cost: $48 per read-only user annually

[Read-only users](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/6417204-why-and-how-to-use-read-only-users-in-qase) have limited permissions and cannot create or modify test cases, but can view and comment on existing content.

---

Related Articles

[Business plan](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563727-business-plan)[Why and How to Use Read-Only Users in Qase](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/6417204-why-and-how-to-use-read-only-users-in-qase)[TMS Pricing: Explained](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/9855720-tms-pricing-explained)[AIDEN Pricing: Explained](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/11737411-aiden-pricing-explained)[TMS Pricing: Data Retention Add-on](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/12632372-tms-pricing-data-retention-add-on)

title: TMS Pricing: Data Retention Add-on
text:
[What are Data Retention Limits? Read here.](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/10401733-what-are-data-retention-limits)

When you need to store test results data for audits, compliance, or long-term analysis, this add-on can help.

This add-on is available for teams on Startup or Business plans who want to keep **Extended Data Retention Add-On** is the simplest way to extend your data access without upgrading to Enterprise.

## **How It Works**

The add-on extends your plan’s default data retention:

* **Startup plan:** 90 days → extend to 5 or 10 years
* **Business plan:** 1 year → extend to 5 or 10 years

You can choose the retention period that best fits your team.

Charges are per regular user and prorated to match your subscription cycle, so you always know exactly what you’ll pay.

**Important:** Data that expired before you purchase the add-on cannot be recovered. You need to keep the add-on active to access historical data for the full period.

## **Pricing**

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Retention Period** | **Price per User / Month** | **Quarterly** | **Annual** |
| **+5 years** | $8 | $24 | $96 |
| **+10 years** | $12 | $36 | $144 |

**Example:** A Business plan with 10 regular users choosing 5-year retention:

* Monthly: 10 × $8 = **$80/month**
* Annual: 10 × $96 = **$960/year**

You’ll see a live total in your billing page before proceeding with the add-on.

Charges adjust automatically if you add more regular users down the line.

## **Managing Your Add-On**

**Purchase:** Activate the add-on anytime by going to **[Workspace → Subscription](https://app.qase.io/billing)**.

Simply select **+5 years** or **+10 years**, review your live cost preview, and confirm.

**Upgrade**: Move from 5 years to 10 years at any time. The change takes effect immediately, and your bill is prorated so you only pay for what you use.

**Downgrade**: Move from 10 years to 5 years at your next billing cycle. You’ll see a clear warning if any data will be affected, so there are no surprises.

**Cancellation:** If you cancel the add-on, any data older than your plan’s default retention (Startup: 90 days, Business: 1 year) will no longer be accessible. Keep the add-on active to maintain full access to your extended history.

## **FAQs**

**Q: Can I switch retention options later?**

A: Yes. Upgrades are effective immediately; downgrades apply at renewal.

**Q: What if I add more users?**

A: The cost adjusts automatically for regular users.

**Q: Are read-only users included?**

A: No. Pricing applies only to regular users.

**Q: What happens if I cancel?**

A: Data older than your plan’s default retention will no longer be accessible.

---

Related Articles

[Business plan](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563727-business-plan)[How do I fix a 403 error?](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/8581155-how-do-i-fix-a-403-error)[TMS Pricing: Explained](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/9855720-tms-pricing-explained)[What are data retention Limits?](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/10401733-what-are-data-retention-limits)[TMS Pricing: SSO Add-on](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/12447577-tms-pricing-sso-add-on)

title: AIDEN Pricing: Explained
text:
Fromthe [Billing page](https://app.qase.io/billing), you can view AIDEN's usage, and toggle the over-usage option.

AIDEN is **available** for all workspaces with an active subscription. To disable AIDEN completely, please [turn off](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/11776118-disable-ai-features-in-your-workspace) the 'AI-powered workspace' toggle.

Based on your workspace plan, a quota of credits are provided.

**Over usage** beyond the monthly allowance **is disabled by default**, but you will have an option to manually enable it, from the billing page.

# Your subscription comes with **Included credits**

Each paid plan includes a monthly allowance of AIDEN credits. These credits do not roll over and they reset every month.

To use AIDEN, a workspace must have an active TMS subscription plan.

Depending on your current subscription plan, you shall get the following number of credits.

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| **Plan** | **Credits (per Month)** |
| Startup | 1000 Credits |
| Business | 2000 Credits |
| Enterprise | 4000 Credits |

*Credits are reset monthly on the same date as your subscription start date.*

|  |
| --- |
| The following features require AIDEN credits: |
| Step generation attempt |
| A successful step generation |
| Code display |
| Manual test case generated |
| Test case analysed (Test Advisor) |

*The cost of the action may vary depending on factors such as the number of attempts, the size of the test case and other factors.*

---

## Over usage

Owners and Administrators will be alerted via email when 80% and 100% of the included monthly AIDEN credits are used.

When you run out of the included AIDEN credits from your plan, you can still continue AIDEN usage by allowing **over usage.**

Credits used beyond the monthly allowance are billed at **$0.40** per credit.

## Limiting Over usage

When over usage is enabled, a budget can be setup to ensure AIDEN doesn't go over the specified limit.

Budget defaults to unlimited usage, but you can set a custom amount based on your needs.

Once AIDEN reaches your budget threshold and exhausts the allocated credits, the system will automatically suspend further usage to protect against overages.

⚠️ **Please note, the budget threshold applies to your entire billing term.**

For example, on a yearly plan, where the budget threshold is set to $300:

if in month your usage exceeds the included credits and costs $350, you will be billed once your usage crosses the $300 mark.

After paying the resulting invoice, the budget does not automatically reset, it still applies to the full billing term.

To allow additional usage beyond the initial budget, you must manually increase the threshold.

---

## Billing

For **Monthly plan**: additional usage credits will be billed at the end of each billing cycle as part of the **monthly invoice**.

For **Yearly plan:** since yearly subscriptions are typically invoiced upfront, any additional AIDEN credit usage beyond the included monthly allowance will be billed **separately.** You'll receive an invoice **each time you spend $300** using AIDEN.

---

---

Related Articles

[TMS Pricing: Explained](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/9855720-tms-pricing-explained)[TMS Pricing: Data Retention Add-on](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/12632372-tms-pricing-data-retention-add-on)

title: What are data retention Limits?
text:
Please note that upgrading to a subscription will not recover test run data that is already inaccessible. The upgrade will only extend your data retention period for future runs.

## Data Accessibility by Subscription Plan

Depending on your subscription plan, there are limitations on the duration of past data that is accessible:

* **Free Plan:** Access to past data is limited to 30 days.
* **Start-up Plan:** Access to past data is limited to 90 days.
* **Business Plan:** Access to past data is limited to 1 year.
* **Enterprise Plan:** There are no restrictions; all past data remains accessible.​​

​**Definition of "Data"**

By data, we refer to test data such as results, defects and change log activity.​  
​

**Test Run Data:**

When data retention limitations are active on your subscription, older test run data will no longer be visible or accessible.

​**Repository - Run History:**

The run history screen in the repository will reflect the data retention limitation by only showing data within the accessible timeframe based on your subscription.  
​

​**Defects:**

Defect will only display entries that fall within the data retention window applicable to your current subscription plan..  
​

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What happens if I downgrade from a paid subscription to the free plan?**  
​

If you downgrade to the free plan, the 30-day data retention limit will immediately apply. You will lose access to test run data, defects, and change log activity older than 30 days.  
​

**I briefly switched from a paid subscription to the free plan and then back to a paid plan. What happens to my test run data?**  
​

When you switch to the free plan, your subscription start date is reset. As a result, only data from the past 30 days (relative to your switch date) will be retained. Switching back to a paid plan will not restore data older than 30 days.  
​

---

Related Articles

title: Billing Options
text:

You can manage your Qase subscription from the [Billing section](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/6682023-workspace-management-billing) of the Workspace.

*Enterprise subscription:*

* available as an annual plan

title: How do I update my billing email and address?
text:
# Update your billing address

---

Since your billing address will appear on your invoices, it’s important to ensure it is complete and up to date.

You can add, or edit your billing address from the workspace's [Billing](https://app.qase.io/billing) section.

1. Navigate to <https://app.qase.io/billing>, and click "Edit billing details"

   
2. Fill out the details in the form:

   

   * **Full name:** either the company name or the name of the person that the invoice should be billed to.
   * **Country or region.**
   * **Company address.**
   * **City/State/Province -** options can be different depending on the country your company is registered in
   * **ZIP/Postal code**
   * **Tax ID**

# Add / Update your billing email

---

By default, the invoices are forwarded to the email address of the owner of the workspace.

However, if you want to add another recipient (*such as your Accounts Payable or Finance department*).

Please send us your request to [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#a0d3d5d0d0cfd2d4e0d1c1d3c58ec9cf), or contact our support team via the in-app chat.

title: Free Plan
text:
⚠️ We've made some **important changes to our Free plan** on **November 18**, **2024**. [Upgrade now](https://app.qase.io/billing) to gain access to additional functionality, and to avoid running into limits or losing historical data.

To learn more about this update, [click here](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/9902729-free-plan-updates) 🔗

The Free Plan is good for single quality assurance engineers and small companies, and provides access to the following:

* Limited to 2 [projects](https://intercom.help/qase/en/articles/5563706-projects)
* Up to 3 [regular users](https://intercom.help/qase/en/articles/5563739-workspace-management-users) in a team
* 30 days of [test run data](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/10401733-what-are-data-retention-limits)
* 2 concurrent [test runs](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563702-test-runs)
* 500Mb for [attachments](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563708-attachments)
* [Defect](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563710-defects) management
* [Shared steps](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563709-shared-steps)
* Access to [Qase Public API](https://intercom.help/qase/en/articles/6664958-qase-api) and [Reporter Apps](https://intercom.help/qase/en/articles/6664994-api-reporters) (⚠️ - *upto 25,000 results per month*)
* Community Support

There is a maximum number of 3 Regular users on the free plan.

To upgrade your Workspace to a paid plan, you need to have an "Owner" or "Administrator" role in your Workspace. Or, [schedule a quick call](https://calendly.com/d/2hk-f9q-5h5/qase-upgrade-discussion) with a member of our team to confirm the correct configuration for your Workspace.

title: Startup plan
text:
The full-featured Startup plan helps organize collaboration within distributed teams of ***more than three people*** and provides access to the following capabilities:

* [Core features](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/6639381-free-plan) (test case management, shared steps, milestones, test plans and runs, defects).
* 1000 [AIDEN Credits](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/11737411-aiden-pricing-explained), per month
* 90 days of [test run data](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/10401733-what-are-data-retention-limits)
* 100 GB storage for [attachments](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563708-attachments)
* [Global Shared Parameters](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/6640037-test-case-parameters)
* [Global Shared Steps](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563709-shared-steps)
* [API](https://developers.qase.io/docs) and [Webhooks](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563718-webhooks)
* [Custom fields](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563701-custom-fields) for test cases, test runs, and defects
* [Dashboards](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563698-dashboards)
* [Requirements](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/6640037-test-case-parameters)
* [Read only users](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/6417204-why-and-how-to-use-read-only-users-in-qase) at minimal cost.

There is a minimum number of 3 seats.

To upgrade or downgrade your current plan to a Startup plan, you need to have an "Owner" or "Administrator" role in your Workspace. Or, [schedule a quick call](https://calendly.com/d/2hk-f9q-5h5/qase-upgrade-discussion) with a member of our team to confirm the correct configuration for your Workspace.

---

title: Business plan
text:
The Business plan is the best starting point for teams 5+ that need extra flexibility on the user management side:

* All features from [Startup plan](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563728-startup-plan)
* Up to 100 users per team
* 2000 [AIDEN Credits](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/11737411-aiden-pricing-explained), per month
* 1 year of [test run data](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/10401733-what-are-data-retention-limits)
* Unlimited storage for [attachments](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563708-attachments)
* [Role-based Access Control (RBAC)](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563741-workspace-management-roles)
* [Test case review](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563713-test-case-review)
* [AI Test Case Generator](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/9653096-ai-test-case-generator)
* [Requirements Traceability Report](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/9123660-requirements-traceability-report)
* [Queries](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563699-queries-qql-qase-query-language) (QQL, Qase Query Language)
* [Read only users](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/6417204-why-and-how-to-use-read-only-users-in-qase) at minimal cost.
* Premium Support

There is a minimum number of 5 seats.

To upgrade or downgrade your current plan to a Business plan, you need to have an "Owner" or "Administrator" role in your Workspace.

Please reach out to our team to schedule a [discovery & demo](https://calendly.com/qase/demo) or [upgrade call](https://calendly.com/d/2hk-f9q-5h5/qase-upgrade-discussion) to ensure the correct configuration and features for your team.

---

title: Enterprise plan
text:
The Enterprise plan is the best starting point for teams 20+ that need extra flexibility on the user management side and more robust security features:

* All features from the [Business Plan](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563727-business-plan)
* [Single Sign-On (SAML 2.0)](https://help.qase.io/en/articles/5563730-workspace-management-security)
* [User provisioning](https://intercom.help/qase/en/articles/8556234-scim) (SCIM)
* 4000 AIDEN credits
* SLA
* Customer success manager
* Enterprise Support
* Dedicated installation (Add-on)

There is a minimum number of 20 seats.

To learn about the pricing offered for the Enterprise plan, please schedule a meeting with our team by clicking on “Get Quote” under the Enterprise section found on the [Pricing page](https://qase.io/pricing).

---

title: AIDEN, Evolved: A Live Look at the Newest AI-Powered Testing Features
text:
Since we launched AIDEN, our AI sidekick, we've been listening closely to teams who use it every day. Your feedback has been clear: writing automation is slow, debugging flaky tests is a pain, and that backlog of manual tests isn't getting any smaller. We took that to heart and have been focused on making AIDEN a more powerful tool to tackle these exact problems.

It’s not that Qase is better because it has AI. It’s that AI is finally better, because you can now use it in Qase.

Join us for a live demo with Qase Founder Nikita Fedorov and VP of Product Glen Holmes to see the concrete improvements we've made to help you ship quality code, faster.

We'll show you how the latest updates help you:

* From Test Case to Executable Code in Seconds: We'll do a live conversion of a standard manual test case into clean, maintainable, and exportable automation code. You'll see how AIDEN handles locators, actions, and assertions, generating a script that’s ready to be integrated directly into your CI/CD pipeline.
* Root Cause Analysis, Not Just Error Logs: Go beyond the stack trace. We'll intentionally break a test and show how AIDEN analyzes the failure context.
* Test Selection: See test analyzer in action.

This is your chance to see the practical updates that will directly impact your workflow, ask questions, and see where AI in testing is headed. If you’re tired of the AI hype and want to see how it can solve real-world problems, this is for you.

**[RECORDING LINK](https://us02web.zoom.us/rec/share/2-cF89THclNrtXlIKGsLdY95Fs2Ad4NoTc0eHv3LJ1oJZQkQXrKMNNF-xf8TLrR9.-OlGRHzqbfOmPULp)**
